title: thladiantha henryi var. verrucosa
intro: Thladiantha henryi var. verrucosa is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Thladiantha, commonly known as the Chinese potato or Henning's potato. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thladiantha henryi var. verrucosa include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and reduce inflammation. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and it can also be dried and made into capsules or tablets for easier consumption.
